description: Long-term post-training monitoring: loss, reward, evaluation, parameter dynamics, sparse quality, and upload metrics.

options.content:
# GRAIL Trainer Dashboard
Training progress, evaluation results, parameter dynamics, and checkpoint uploads. Panels populate after the first training epoch completes.

panels.description: Latest optimizer step count.

targets.expr: max(max_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json optimizer_step | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap optimizer_step [$__range]))

panels.title: Optimizer Step

panels.description: Latest training window number.

targets.expr: max(max_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.state"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json window | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap window [$__range]))

panels.title: Window

panels.description: Latest total loss value.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json loss_total | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap loss_total [$__range]))

panels.title: Loss

panels.description: Latest mean reward across the batch.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json reward_mean | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap reward_mean [$__range]))

panels.title: Reward Mean

panels.description: Latest eval pass@5 (held-out tasks).

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json pass_5 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap pass_5 [$__range]))

panels.title: Eval pass@5

panels.description: Latest KL divergence from reference policy.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json kl_divergence | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap kl_divergence [$__range]))

panels.title: KL Divergence

panels.description: Latest gradient norm after clipping.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json grad_norm | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap grad_norm [$__range]))

panels.title: Grad Norm

panels.description: Training epochs completed.

targets.expr: max(max_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.state"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json epoch | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap epoch [$__range]))

panels.title: Epochs

panels.description: Total training loss over optimizer steps.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json loss_total | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap loss_total [$__auto])

panels.title: Total Loss

panels.description: Breakdown of policy gradient, KL, and entropy loss components.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json loss_pg | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap loss_pg [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json loss_kl | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap loss_kl [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json loss_entropy | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap loss_entropy [$__auto])

panels.title: Loss Components

panels.description: Mean reward per batch over training.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json reward_mean | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap reward_mean [$__auto])

panels.title: Reward Curve

panels.description: Learning rate schedule over training.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json lr | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap lr [$__auto])

panels.title: Learning Rate

panels.description: KL divergence from reference policy over training.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json kl_divergence | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap kl_divergence [$__auto])

panels.title: KL Divergence

panels.description: Adaptive KL penalty coefficient (adjusts to keep KL near target).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json kl_coef | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap kl_coef [$__auto])

panels.title: Adaptive KL Coefficient

panels.description: Mean policy entropy and gradient norm over training.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json entropy_mean | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap entropy_mean [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json grad_norm | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap grad_norm [$__auto])

panels.title: Entropy and Grad Norm

panels.description: Fraction of importance sampling ratios that were clipped (PPO) or hit the ceiling.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json ratio_clip_frac | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap ratio_clip_frac [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json ratio_ceiling_frac | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap ratio_ceiling_frac [$__auto])

panels.title: IS Ratio Clipping

panels.description: Mean advantage value per batch (should be near zero by construction).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.step"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json advantage_mean | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap advantage_mean [$__auto])

panels.title: Advantage Mean

panels.description: Evaluation pass@k over time (held-out tasks).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json pass_1 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap pass_1 [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json pass_5 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap pass_5 [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json pass_10 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap pass_10 [$__auto])

panels.title: Eval pass@k

panels.description: Evaluation success rate and reward mean over time.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json success_rate_all | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap success_rate_all [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json reward_mean_all | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap reward_mean_all [$__auto])

panels.title: Eval Success Rate and Reward

panels.description: Time spent on each evaluation cycle.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json duration_sec | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap duration_sec [$__auto])

panels.title: Eval Duration

panels.description: Evaluation throughput (tasks evaluated per second).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.eval"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json tasks_per_sec | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap tasks_per_sec [$__auto])

panels.title: Eval Throughput

panels.description: Fraction of parameters unchanged at the primary threshold (higher = more sparse = smaller delta uploads).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.params"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json sparsity_ratio | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap sparsity_ratio [$__auto])

panels.title: Sparsity Ratio

panels.description: Mean and max absolute parameter delta per optimizer step.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.params"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json mean_abs_delta | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap mean_abs_delta [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.params"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json max_abs_delta | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap max_abs_delta [$__auto])

panels.title: Parameter Deltas

panels.description: Fraction of parameters that changed sign between optimizer steps.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.params"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json sign_flip_ratio | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap sign_flip_ratio [$__auto])

panels.title: Sign Flip Ratio

panels.description: Number of parameters that changed above the primary threshold.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.params"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json changed_count | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap changed_count [$__auto])

panels.title: Changed Parameter Count

panels.description: Relative parameter change (delta / |param|) over time.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.params"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json mean_relative_delta | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap mean_relative_delta [$__auto])

panels.title: Relative Delta

panels.description: KL divergence between sparse and full model outputs (lower = better sparse approximation). Random baseline shown for comparison.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.sparse"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json kl_div_1e_06 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap kl_div_1e_06 [$__auto])

avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.sparse"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json kl_div_1e_06_random | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap kl_div_1e_06_random [$__auto])

panels.title: Sparse Quality: KL Divergence

panels.description: Top-1 token agreement between sparse and full models (higher = better). Random baseline for comparison.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.sparse"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json top1_agree_1e_06 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap top1_agree_1e_06 [$__auto])

avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.sparse"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json top1_agree_1e_06_random | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap top1_agree_1e_06_random [$__auto])

panels.title: Sparse Quality: Top-1 Agreement

panels.description: Fraction of parameter update preserved in sparse delta (at 1e-6 threshold).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.sparse"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json kept_ratio_1e_06 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap kept_ratio_1e_06 [$__auto])

panels.title: Sparse Kept Ratio

panels.description: Cosine similarity between sparse and full model outputs.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.sparse"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json cosine_1e_06 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap cosine_1e_06 [$__auto])

panels.title: Sparse Cosine Similarity

panels.description: Checkpoint upload duration and type over time.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.upload"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json duration_sec | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap duration_sec [$__auto])

panels.title: Upload Duration

panels.description: Upload size in MB per checkpoint.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.upload"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json total_mb | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap total_mb [$__auto])

panels.title: Upload Size

panels.description: Delta checkpoint compression ratio (higher = better compression).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.upload"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json delta_compression_ratio | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap delta_compression_ratio [$__auto])

panels.title: Delta Compression Ratio

panels.description: Epoch duration, GPU memory allocation, and replay buffer state.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.state"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json event epoch_duration_sec | event = `epoch_end` | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap epoch_duration_sec [$__auto])

avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.state"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json event gpu_alloc_gb | event = `epoch_end` | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap gpu_alloc_gb [$__auto])

panels.title: Epoch Duration and GPU Memory

panels.description: Pre-filter data quality: pass@k computed on raw miner rollouts before group filtering.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.data"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json pass_1 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap pass_1 [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.data"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json pass_5 | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap pass_5 [$__auto])

panels.title: Pre-filter pass@k

panels.description: Pre-filter success rate and mean reward from miner rollouts.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.data"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json success_rate_all | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap success_rate_all [$__auto])
avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.data"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json reward_mean_all | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap reward_mean_all [$__auto])

panels.title: Pre-filter Success Rate and Reward

panels.description: Mean completion length from miner rollouts (detects length explosion).

targets.expr: avg_over_time({logger="grail.trainer.data"} | pattern `<_>] <payload>` | line_format `{{ .payload }}` | json mean_length | __error__=`` | drop payload | unwrap mean_length [$__auto])

panels.title: Completion Lengths

title: GRAIL Trainer
